_seam_note: Content-graph IR: the panel pipeline WRITES this (wiki_to_comic.py projects it from the wiki graph on gate-pass); build_comic.py INLINES it into comic/index.html (no runtime fetch). image_path currently points at seeds/ as placeholder until panels are generated (then -> panels/SXX_panel_aNN.png).
_crop_note: crop is an OBJECT (review blocker #1): {shape, position:[x,y] object-position 0..1 focal point, zoom>=1}. shape drives container aspect at layout time; position+zoom frame the 16:9 source inside the (square/hero/wide) container WITHOUT re-generating other ratios — point position at the subjects so square cells never slice faces. Real generated panels are composed-to-shape so heavy zoom is rarely needed.

title.zh: ARIS — 我把那 24 小时交出去了
title.en: ARIS — I Handed Over Those 24 Hours

tagline.en: While you're away, the research carries on.

defaults._text_mode_options: html (HTML/CSS owns the whole bubble — design-locked default) | baked (text drawn into the image — RE-OPENED by user, pending the AI-baked-text duel once image_gen cools) | code (deterministic code-drawn bubble). per-panel override allowed via panels.<id>.text_mode.
defaults._locale_note: EN default for the international GitHub audience; zh first-class via toggle. text_fits gate must pass BOTH; size safe-zones to the longer (usually EN).

title.zh:
我把那 24 小时
交出去了

tag.zh: 一个自主科研智能体替她通宵跑完研究。离投稿，还有二十四小时。
tag.en: An autonomous agent runs the research overnight. 24 hours to the deadline.

narration.zh: 23:58，她按下 Enter，把最后 24 小时整个交了出去。ARIS 的自主交接从这一刻生效——此后每一个错误都没有人类兜底，得它自己抓出来。
narration.en: At 23:58 she hits Enter and hands over the entire final 24 hours. ARIS's autonomous hand-off begins here — from now on no human catches its mistakes; it must catch its own.

beat_title.zh: B03 双线 · 人间∥空洞
beat_title.en: B03 Parallel · Her World ∥ The Void

narration.zh: 她回到人间上课，家里那杯咖啡的热气正一点点变淡；同一时刻，executor 在空洞里撒出 20 张想法卡。ARIS 不占用她的任何一分钟——代价是，接下来每个岔路口都没人替它拍板，而可能性铺得越多，等会儿被烧掉的也越多。
narration.en: She returns to class while the coffee back home loses its steam; at the same moment the executor fans 20 idea cards across the void. ARIS costs her zero minutes — the price: no one makes its calls at the forks ahead, and the more possibilities it spreads, the more will burn.

pages.skill: novelty-check :: kill duplicates before any experiment runs

narration.zh: 20 个想法过查新闸门，6 个当场烧掉——早有人做过了。novelty-check 在动手实验之前先杀重复——代价是 executor 引以为傲的牌，三成没活过这一格。
narration.en: Twenty ideas hit the novelty gate; six burn on the spot — someone got there first. novelty-check kills duplicates before any experiment runs — the cost: a third of the executor's proud hand never survives this panel.

beat_title.zh: B05 教室 · 一拍怀疑
beat_title.en: B05 Classroom · A Beat of Doubt

pages.skill: autonomous overnight run :: no human in the loop

narration.zh: 第二天的课上，她望向窗外——那 24 小时已经不在她手里了。把研究交出去换来了讲台前的安稳，代价是连怀疑都只能隔着口袋里那块 T-18:40 的屏幕。
narration.en: In next morning's class she stares out the window — those 24 hours are no longer hers. Handing the research over bought her this seat in a lecture hall; the price is that even her doubt must wait behind a pocket screen reading T-18:40.

beat_title.zh: B06 实验 · 曲线起飞

pages.skill: experiment-bridge :: plan → deployment, evidence is provisional

narration.zh: 她睡着的第一个小时，实验已经真的跑在八张卡上；凌晨曲线从 0.60 爬到 0.71，executor 蹦得老高。experiment-bridge 回传的每个点都只是暂定证据——这份得意，后面每一分都要还。最下面那格,没有人说话。
narration.en: Within her first hour asleep the experiment is really running on eight GPUs; by the small hours the curve climbs 0.60 → 0.71 and the executor bounces sky-high. Every point experiment-bridge streams back is provisional — and every bit of this pride will be paid back. In the bottom panel, nobody says a word.

beat_title.zh: B07 第三轮 · REJECT 与碎 JSON
beat_title.en: B07 · REJECT and the Broken JSON

pages.skill: auto-review-loop :: adversarial review keeps no polite hours

narration.zh: 整批跑完，reviewer 把一条坏 JSON 钉到屏幕正中央——曲线应声跌到 0.66；红章砸下：第一轮，打回。auto-review-loop 里两个人不同心是设计——它打断的不是外人，是队友刚攒起来的庆祝，这一夜的进度条先为诚实倒退了一格。
narration.en: The full batch lands and the reviewer pins one broken JSON dead-center — the curve sags to 0.66; the red stamp comes down: round one, rejected. In auto-review-loop the two are designed to disagree — what it interrupts is its own teammate's celebration, and tonight's progress bar steps backward first, to stay honest.

pages.skill: auto-review-loop + experiment-audit :: numbers must survive hostile inspection

narration.zh: executor 正要庆祝，reviewer 把放大镜按在了评分管线上——最好看的数字，最先受审。ARIS 先审计、后庆祝——代价是 +6.2 被扣在审计门口，无法成为 claim。
narration.en: The executor was mid-cheer when the reviewer pressed a magnifier onto the evaluation pipeline — the prettiest number gets audited first. ARIS audits before it celebrates; the cost is that +6.2 is held at the gate and cannot become a claim.

narration.zh: 第一轮就开出漂亮的成绩：schema-keyword-first 领先 +6.2，executor 已经举起了手。但在 ARIS 里证据只是暂定的（experiment-bridge）——这张曲线还没资格变成 claim，庆祝被按下了暂停。
narration.en: The first pass looked clean: schema-keyword-first led by +6.2 and the executor's arm was already up. In ARIS, evidence is provisional (experiment-bridge) — the curve hasn't earned claim status yet, so the celebration stays on hold.

pages.skill: experiment-audit :: check the apparatus, not just outputs

narration.zh: 审计扒开评分管线：评测器在打分之前，偷偷把坏 JSON 修好了。experiment-audit 审的是仪器而不只是输出——代价是，刚刚那 +6.2 当场失去资格。
narration.en: The audit cut the pipeline open: the evaluator had been silently repairing broken JSON before scoring it. experiment-audit checks the apparatus, not just the outputs — and the cost is that the +6.2 is disqualified on the spot.

pages.skill: honest re-run :: correct the overclaim before the paper exists

narration.zh: 同一批输出绕开修复器裸跑重评，+6.2 当场坍缩成 +1.4，多出来的 +4.8 是评测器自己修出来的。honest re-run 在论文存在之前就纠正了自己的 overclaim——executor 的得意被压到整夜最低点。
narration.en: The same outputs were rescored raw, bypassing the sanitizer: +6.2 collapsed to +1.4, and the extra +4.8 turned out to be the evaluator's own repairs. The honest re-run corrects its own overclaim before the paper exists — and the executor's pride hits its lowest point of the night.

narration.zh: 判决落下：WARN_corrected——结果没有被删除，而是被降级、标注、带着边界继续往前走。ARIS 保住有用的信号、把不确定写在明面上——代价是，论文里再也写不出 +6.2。
narration.en: The verdict lands: WARN_corrected — the result isn't deleted, it's downgraded, labeled, and carried forward with its scope. ARIS keeps the useful signal and marks the uncertainty out loud — the cost: +6.2 can never appear in the paper.

beat_title.zh: 通胀审计 · 全景回顾

pages.skill: experiment-audit :: sanitizer ≠ validator → raw re-eval → WARN_corrected

narration.zh: 四格连读：+6.2 的假象 → 修复器现形 → 坍缩到 +1.4 → 诚实判决。一夜审计的全景。
narration.en: The four beats at a glance: the +6.2 mirage → the sanitizer exposed → the collapse to +1.4 → the honest verdict. The audit night, whole.

pages.skill: honest re-run :: what makes an ACCEPT trustworthy

narration.zh: 绕开修复器重跑，exact_parse 从 0.78 涨到 0.89，这一次绿章 ACCEPT 落下。honest re-run 让 ACCEPT 变得可信——代价是它来得更晚、数字更小，但没有人需要替它脸红。
narration.en: Rerun with the sanitizer bypassed, exact_parse climbed 0.78 to 0.89, and this time the green ACCEPT lands. The honest re-run is what makes an ACCEPT trustworthy — it arrives later and smaller, but nobody has to blush for it.

narration.zh: 黎明前，ARIS 把这一夜写进 research wiki：想法、被否的 claim、审计、判决、论文决策，连成一条发光的路。research-wiki 把失败也存档成记忆——被拒的那颗星不亮，但它在，下一个 agent 不必再撞一次。
narration.en: Before dawn, ARIS writes the night into the research wiki: ideas, the rejected claim, the audit, the verdict, the paper decision — one glowing path. research-wiki keeps even the failures as memory — the rejected star stays dark, but it stays, so the next agent never has to hit it again.

pages.skill: paper-writing :: the boundary goes inside the conclusion

narration.zh: 论文照实落笔：+1.4，scope-limited，连那个整夜碎着的 Tokyo 也以修好的样子进了结果页。paper-writing 把边界写进结论——代价是数字变小了，但每一个都敢被检查。
narration.en: The paper goes down honestly: +1.4, scope-limited, and the Tokyo that spent the night in pieces enters the results page repaired. paper-writing puts the boundary inside the conclusion — the number got smaller, but every digit can survive inspection.

pages.skill: autonomous submission :: the final 42 minutes leave her hands

narration.zh: 凌晨的街上她往家走，不知道论文正在此刻上传；T-00:42，ARIS 替她按下提交。它敢按,是因为这个数字先被自己人砍过——从 +6.2 砍到 +1.4——所以 executor 的拳头只敢握得很小。
narration.en: She walks home through the small hours, not knowing the paper is uploading; at T-00:42, ARIS presses submit on her behalf. It dares to press because the number was first cut by its own hand — +6.2 down to +1.4 — which is why the executor's fist pump stays small.

beat_title.zh: B12 归家 · 凉掉的咖啡

pages.skill: the arc pays off :: the bill was charged to a coffee no one drank

narration.zh: 她到家，伸手握住那只杯子——咖啡在她不在的 24 小时里彻底凉透了；隔着一块玻璃，她和 executor 击了一掌，他只是微微一弹。ARIS 交还给她的不是最漂亮的数字，而是敢署她名字的数字。
narration.en: She gets home and wraps her hand around the mug — the coffee went stone cold in the 24 hours she was away; through the glass she and the executor share a high-five, and he gives only the smallest bounce. What ARIS hands back is not the prettiest number, but one that can carry her name.

tag.en: While you're away, the research carries on.

caption.zh: 离截止还有 24 小时。
caption.en: Twenty-four hours to the deadline.

condition.identity_desc: LEFT of the reference sheet = the researcher (she): black rectangular glasses slipping down her nose, dark short hair, plain black tee. RIGHT of the sheet = the ARIS DUO: the blue executor (brown hair, NO beard, blue hoodie) and the green reviewer (dark hair, beard, green hoodie) — match them EXACTLY
condition.characters: the researcher slumped at her desk in the UPPER-RIGHT, chin propped on one hand, EXHAUSTED, staring at the dark failed-run log on the laptop — she stays the main figure. AND, baked into the scene at the BOTTOM (small, in front of the laptop on the desk surface, like two palm-sized holographic agents projected from the failed screen): the ARIS DUO in an ADVERSARIAL MULTI-AGENT DEBATE — the blue executor leans IN, both hands thrown forward, eagerly PROPOSING a fix; the green reviewer stands FACING him, arms crossed / one hand raised to object, skeptically PUSHING BACK. They are turned toward each other in visible disagreement (the adversarial review made literal) — small but clearly two distinct chibi agents arguing, glowing faint cyan like a hologram so they read as the digital agents, not real people in her room
condition.scene: late-night warm bedroom-study (density target cal_S12): Edison desk lamp over a desk buried in printed papers with red-pen margins; bookshelf spines legible 'LLM DECODING' / 'STRUCTURED OUTPUTS' / 'EVALS FIRST'; a hand-written TODO note 'better masks / schema locks / evals'; the laptop screen shows a DARK failed-experiment log (do NOT draw any aris command — that is the next panel); on the desk corner HER 'ML RESEARCH' mug HOT with two steady steam plumes (the film's temperature origin); a bright sticky note 'dllm-schema-keyword-first' on the monitor bezel (decorative, small); outside the window a COOL blue night-city skyline contrasts the warm room. The technical figure from image #1 (the amber DDL countdown chip 'DDL T-24:00:00') sits ON the desk beside the laptop as a small physical widget. COMPOSITION CONSTRAINT: this panel doubles as the COVER base — keep the LEFT 55% of the frame LOW-DETAIL (soft warm gradients, no text, no busy props) for the HTML title overlay; place ALL baked anchors (DDL chip, sticky notes, laptop, her) in the RIGHT half.

text.zh: 这一轮交给 ARIS 了，我去睡了。
text.en: This round's on ARIS. I'm going to sleep.

caption.zh: 23:58，她把最后 24 小时整个交了出去。
caption.en: At 23:58 she hands over the entire final 24 hours.

condition.identity_desc: LEFT of the ref sheet = the researcher (black glasses, dark short hair, black tee); RIGHT of the ref sheet = the ARIS duo (blue-hoodie executor: brown hair NO beard; green-hoodie reviewer: dark hair WITH beard)
condition.characters: the researcher on the WARM left side, fingers just lifted off the Enter key, tired but relieved, rising from the chair; on the DARK right side the duo wakes — the blue executor leaps with BOTH arms thrown up in his HIGHEST jump of the whole film (bounce MAX, the arc's origin), the green reviewer lands steady, arms crossed, eyes already locked on the terminal card
condition.scene: ONE panel split diagonally along the laptop screen into two worlds (ART_BIBLE §0.5 seam): LEFT half = the same warm bedroom at night (Edison lamp, the SAME 'ML RESEARCH' mug still HOT with two plumes — same heat as S01, no higher; a hand-written note 'submit / sleep'; backpack on the chair; cool blue night-city out the window); RIGHT half = the laptop screen torn open into the #0A0E27 dark-cyber void (neon grid floor, faint wiki glow, idea ghosts). The technical figure from image #1 (the HAND-OFF terminal card: '$ aris run --task dllm-schema-keyword-first --deadline 24h' + green 'ARIS ONLINE' stamp + amber DDL chip 'T-24:00:00') RIDES THE SEAM — half on her screen, half floating in the dark world (density target cal_S12 on both sides).

S12._condition: per-panel content-driven gen config: the engine feeds content_svg (rendered to PNG) as -i ref #1 + duo_canonical as #2; bubbles are BAKED into the prompt (text_mode=baked)

condition.scene: warm-lit pixel ML research lab at night. The back board/monitor shows the method diagram (random-mask row ends red exact_parse FAIL with 'span 跨边界切碎'; schema-keyword-first row ends green OK with 'span ⊆ schema') plus a small wandb exact_parse curve with an amber Δ +6.2 callout. FILL the warm room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): bookshelf spines 'LLM DECODING' / 'STRUCTURED OUTPUTS' / 'EVALS FIRST', a hand-drawn TODO note ('better masks ☐ / schema locks ☐ / evals ☑'), an open laptop showing real readable code 'def exact_parse(json_str, schema): ...', an 'ML RESEARCH' mug and a '</>' mug, a small potted plant, warm Edison desk lamps; a cool blue night-city skyline glows through the window behind the warm interior (warm room vs cool night = in-panel two-world contrast)

chibi_action.executor: warm foreground LOWER-LEFT, one arm thrust up in triumph pointing at the board, proud
chibi_action.reviewer: foreground LOWER-RIGHT, arms crossed, eyes narrowed, already glancing toward the code, skeptical

caption.zh: 看起来，去噪顺序就是全部故事。
caption.en: The unmask order looked like the whole story.

condition.scene: dark screen-lit AUDIT LAB at night. A laptop terminal shows the two-column code contrast — LEFT (red, THE BUG): score(json_sanitizer(out)) with '# default-fills malformed keys BEFORE scoring'; RIGHT (honest, green): json.loads + jsonschema.validate with '# raw, no repair'. FILL the dark cyber room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): a faint 'WIKI VOID' swirl glow + dark shelf spines 'JSON SCHEMA AUDIT' / 'EVAL INTEGRITY', a second monitor scrolling raw json.loads logs, a '</>' mug and a cooling coffee, neon-edged panels, one warm desk lamp breaking the cool gloom (cool cyber + warm accent)

chibi_action.reviewer: hunched at the terminal, finger jabbing the red sanitizer line
chibi_action.executor: leaning in over the shoulder, dawning-horror face, a single sweat drop

caption.zh: 评测器在判分前，先把错的修好了。
caption.en: The evaluator repaired the outputs before judging them.

condition.scene: a dark re-eval war-room at night. The center dashboard labeled HONEST RE-EVAL shows the inflated +6.2 visibly cracking and falling into a solid green +1.4, with the +4.8 dropping away labeled 'evaluator self-repair artifact'. FILL the dark cyber room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): a glowing 'RAW' toggle switch flipped on, secondary monitors scrolling raw json.loads re-eval logs, dark shelf spines 'EXPERIMENT AUDIT' / 'RESULT INTEGRITY', neon gridlines on the floor, a '</>' mug, one warm desk lamp accent against the cool cyber gloom

chibi_action.reviewer: flipping a RAW switch on the dashboard, composed
chibi_action.executor: watching the number collapse, humbled but not crushed

text.zh: 纯 raw 重评——真值是 +1.4。
text.en: Raw re-eval — the real number is +1.4.

caption.zh: 效应真，但范围缩小了。
caption.en: Real effect — but the scope narrowed.

condition.scene: a dark verdict chamber at night. A verdict card glows amber: WARN_corrected; the over-claim 'X is best' is struck through and narrows to '...best under an external validator'; a claim-ledger board shows the entry (claim_id / integrity=WARN_corrected / scope). FILL the dark cyber room with legible storytelling props (density target = cal_S12): dark shelf spines 'CLAIM AUDIT' / 'RESEARCH WIKI', a terminal showing the enforced re-run command, neon stamp-glow around the verdict card, a '</>' mug and a half-finished coffee, one warm desk lamp accent against the cool cyber gloom

chibi_action.reviewer: holding/stamping the WARN_corrected verdict, calm authority

text.en: Not killed — but write the scope.

caption.zh: 诚实但不杀稿。
caption.en: Honest, but not killed.

condition.identity_desc: NO characters — the duo are absent; they ARE the constellation
condition.characters: NONE. No characters, no figures, no text anywhere in the image
condition.scene: a full-bleed pixel night sky over a sleeping city: the night's work cooled into a constellation whose shape echoes the wiki star-map (reproduce the star LAYOUT from image #1 faithfully — bright white/green main-path stars, dim ember-red side stars, NO labels, NO text, NO glyphs anywhere); the brightest star (paper) trails one thin warm thread of light down to a TINY amber-lit bedroom window at the bottom edge — the only warm pixels; rooftop silhouettes; keep the LOWER BAND of the sky sparse and low-detail (a safe zone for the HTML tagline)

condition.identity_desc: the researcher (she): black rectangular glasses, dark short hair, black tee — exactly as in the reference
condition.characters: ONLY the researcher (no duo): mid-row in a morning lecture hall, left hand pinning her notebook, right hand nudging her phone half-an-inch into the desk, forcing herself to focus while her eyes drift to the phone
condition.scene: warm morning lecture hall (density cal_S12): tiered seats, soft sunlight; her open notebook shows a readable doodle 'decoding order?'; the technical figure from image #1 (the glowing phone lock-screen card 'ARIS RUNNING' + amber DDL 'T-19:42') lies ON her desk, small but crisp and razor-sharp; in the lower-right corner a small WARM INSET window cuts back to her home desk — the same 'ML RESEARCH' mug in place, its steam now FADING to one thin wisp (time passing); out the lecture-hall window a cool blue daytime city skyline contrasts the warm room

caption.zh: 她回到人间上课。
caption.en: She returns to the human world.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the blue executor leaps at the center of the card fan, excitedly fanning the cards open like a card dealer — bounce HIGH but clearly LOWER than his hand-off MAX jump; the green reviewer stands at the bench edge already sorting cards into an order, brow slightly furrowed
condition.scene: the 'idea workshop' inside the #0A0E27 dark void (density cal_S12): a neon-edged generator bench, floating idea cards trailing light, dark shelf spines 'LLM DECODING' / 'IDEA SPACE' on a hovering rack, ONE small warm desk lamp breaking the cool gloom, neon grid floor converging to a vanishing point (background atmospheric gradients allowed). The technical figure from image #1 (the IDEA DECK fan: '20 IDEAS' badge, the single readable card '#01 schema-first', the amber DDL chip 'T-19:42') IS the centerpiece of the scene

caption.zh: 同一时刻，空洞里撒出 20 张想法卡。
caption.en: At the same moment, twenty idea cards fan across the void.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the green reviewer at the gate console stamps SURVIVES with calm authority; the blue executor watches six of his cards burn — shoulders shrink in a small deflate, then steady into a tempered half-bounce when he sees the fourteen green survivors line up (bounce: high→tempered, the first time reality trims him)
condition.scene: the dark-cyber 'gate hall' (density cal_S12): the gate itself is a glowing wall of literature — bricks are dense dark paper spines (only 'PRIOR ART' and 'STRUCTURED OUTPUTS' readable, the rest blurred), red pixel sparks rise from the ash of the burned cards, the fourteen survivors' green glow reflects on the neon grid floor, a '</>' mug rests on the console as the single warm accent (environment prop, NOT the motif cup). The technical figure from image #1 (the NOVELTY GATE diagram: queue → gate → 6 burned with DUP stamps incl. ONE large foreground DUP card with a small 'arXiv 2024' note → 14 green survivors → the 14/20 scoreboard + green SURVIVES stamp + DDL T-18:55 chip) IS the room

caption.zh: 6 个想法当场烧掉——早有人做过了。
caption.en: Six ideas burn on the spot — someone got there first.

condition.identity_desc: the researcher (she): black rectangular glasses, dark short hair, black tee — exactly as in the reference
condition.characters: ONLY the researcher (no duo): seated by the window, chin in hand, gazing OUT the window, her pen resting mid-doodle; tired, quietly anxious
condition.scene: late-morning golden lecture hall (density cal_S12): sunlight slants across the desks; the blackboard carries readable attention/denoising equations and little sketches; in her notebook margin she has absent-mindedly doodled TWO tiny stick figures in a blue hoodie and a green hoodie; a paper coffee cup on the desk with NO steam (her motif mug is at home); classmates are blurred pixel silhouettes; outside the window cool daylight and a far teaching building contrast the warm room. The technical figure from image #1 (the phone lock-screen widget: green dot + 'ARIS · RUNNING' + amber 'T-18:40') is her phone lying FACE-UP on the desk, small but razor-crisp

text.zh: 它真能跑出……能写进论文的东西吗？
text.en: Can it really produce something that belongs in a paper?

caption.zh: 那 24 小时已经不在她手里了。
caption.en: Those 24 hours are no longer hers.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the blue executor leaps at the console slamming the launch key — bounce: a HIGH launch jump but clearly below his hand-off MAX; the green reviewer stands behind, arms crossed, eyes already on the log screen

The technical figure from image #1 (GPU LAUNCH CONSOLE: the $ aris exp launch terminal line, the 2x4 GPU grid with green status lights, the big 8/8 counter + green RUNNING chip, the amber DDL T-18:30) IS the room's centerpiece

caption.zh: 她睡着的第一个小时，实验已经跑在八张卡上。
caption.en: Within her first hour asleep, the experiment is on eight GPUs.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the blue executor has leapt ONTO the desk, both hands pointing at the 0.71 tick — bounce: high/proud; the green reviewer leans over the step-log side screen instead of the curve, one eyebrow raised, unmoved
condition.scene: the same dark machine room tightened onto the metrics wall (density cal_S12): the big wandb chart card floats over the void — gray flat 'random-mask' baseline ending 0.60, rising green 'schema-first' series ending 0.71, amber callout 0.60 → 0.71; a side screen scrolls 'step 4200…', dark spines 'EVALS FIRST' / 'MASKING', a sticky note 'full batch ☐', the '</>' mug (environment prop) under the warm lamp still faintly steaming, cold neon beneath

caption.zh: 凌晨的曲线从 0.60 爬到 0.71。
caption.en: In the small hours the curve climbs 0.60 → 0.71.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the blue executor leaps front-and-center toward the big curve, BACK TURNED to the stream's lower corner — bounce: proud peak, below his hand-off MAX (the pre-fall high); the green reviewer stands at the wall half-turned toward the downstream flow, EYES NARROWING — only he faces that corner. He says nothing
condition.scene: the machine room opens into a cathedral-scale log wall hanging in the #0A0E27 void (density cal_S12): neon flow columns, the floor grid reflecting the green OK-chip light, dark spines 'STRUCTURED OUTPUTS' / 'RAW LOGS', archive drawers with disk icons, the '</>' mug lukewarm beside the lone warm lamp, the executor's warm confetti pixels drifting against the cold wall. The technical figure from image #1 (RAW SAMPLE STREAM wall: the curve holding 0.71, the 1024/2048 counter, countless tiny OK rows — and in the stream's LOWER CORNER one TINY broken chip, deliberately minuscule, NO callout, NO arrow, nothing pointing at it) fills the frame. PRESERVE that tiny corner chip exactly as in image #1 — small, unremarked, easy to miss

text.en: All green! She'll wake up to a surprise!

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the green reviewer in the foreground decisively PINS the broken chip to the screen's dead center — calm, beard set tight; the blue executor behind him is FROZEN mid-jump, arms still half-raised, face falling — bounce: deflate, frozen in mid-air
condition.scene: the machine room turned interrogation room (density cal_S12): the giant pinned JSON chip floods the dark void with red edge-light; S09's OK-chip glow dims behind it; a pinboard thread visually links the hero chip back to the tiny corner thumbnail; dark shelf spines 'JSON SCHEMA' / 'EVAL INTEGRITY'; the forgotten '</>' mug (environment prop) pushed aside; the lone warm lamp is the only warm pixel. The technical figure from image #1 (the hero {"city":"Tok|yo"} chip with the hard crack, the json.loads → ParseError terminal line, the 0.71→0.66 dip strip with the red 0.66 tick, batch 2048/2048 · 37 malformed, the thread to the S09 corner) IS the room

caption.zh: 整批跑完，曲线应声跌到 0.66。
caption.en: The full batch lands; the curve sags to 0.66 on cue.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the green reviewer swings the stamp DOWN with calm authority (this exact pose will be mirrored when he stamps ACCEPT later); the blue executor is shrunk into the lower corner, shoulders collapsed, arms hanging — bounce: SILENT/small, his lowest so far
condition.scene: the dark verdict chamber (density cal_S12): the stamped card glows red over the #0A0E27 void with pixel impact sparks; behind it in shadow the dimmed 0.66 flatline and dark spines 'REVIEW LOG' / 'ROUND 1'; a loop-arrow relief on the floor hints the loop restarts; the warm lamp pushed to the frame's far end, barely holding against the red. The technical figure from image #1 (the REVIEW · ROUND 1 verdict card: 2048 samples scored, the huge red 37 malformed chip, the Tok|yo evidence thumbnail clipped on, the diagonal REJECT stamp, and the LARGE amber DDL T-16:05 — the burned time is the visible cost) dominates

text.en: Rejected. Fix it, then come back.

caption.zh: 第一轮，打回。
caption.en: Round one: rejected.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the blue executor's celebration is intercepted MID-MOTION — caught halfway into a jump, the reviewer's hand gripping his hood, pixel confetti frozen mid-air (bounce: attempted celebration, ARRESTED before becoming a jump — NOT a full jump); the green reviewer, unhurried, presses the magnifier onto the evaluator block with his other hand
condition.scene: a late-night screen-lit audit room (density cal_SI2): dashboards lighting up block by block behind the holographic pipeline, dark shelf spines 'EVAL INTEGRITY' / 'CLAIM AUDIT', a side screen scrolling evaluator source, the '</>' mug (environment prop) gone cold, neon grid floor, one warm desk lamp breaking the cool. The technical figure from image #1 (EVAL PIPELINE — AUDIT GATE: outputs→evaluator→score pipeline, the glowing gate before 'claim', the AUDIT stamp, the +6.2 claim card physically HELD at the gate with its HOLD chip, the magnifier pressed on the evaluator, the tiny prior-evidence Tok|yo shard at the input, DDL T-05:12) IS the room

caption.zh: 最好看的数字，最先受审。
caption.en: The prettiest number gets audited first.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the green reviewer stamps the green ACCEPT with EXACTLY the same arm pose as his earlier red REJECT slam (a deliberate mirror); the blue executor stands by the curve and allows himself only a SMALL hop — bounce: tempered micro-bounce, proud but earned
condition.scene: the same dark re-eval war-room as the collapse panel but exhaling (density cal_S12): monitors switched from red diffs to steady green parse logs, the RAW switch glowing like a kept promise, shelf spines 'RESULT INTEGRITY' / 'EVAL INTEGRITY', neon grid floor, the '</>' mug half-finished, the lone warm lamp. The technical figure from image #1 (HONEST RE-RUN — RAW SCORING: the rising exact_parse strip with BOTH endpoints called out 0.78 and 0.89, the REVIEW·RE-RUN verdict card with the green 0.89 chip and the diagonal green ACCEPT stamp — same card geometry as the REJECT card, mirrored tilt — sanitizer BYPASSED, json.loads ✓ clean, DDL T-02:58) dominates

caption.zh: 这一次，绿章落下。
caption.en: This time, the green stamp lands.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the executor and reviewer stand side by side at the table's edge, SMALL under the open sky, watching the path light up node by node — the executor's hand hovers above the dim red REJECT star, not touching it; bounce: small/quiet (settled, not deflated)
condition.scene: the dark room's far wall dissolves into an open pixel night sky (density: sparse and reverent, NOT cluttered): the holographic star-map TABLE floats where the desk was, its glow lighting the duo's faces from below; the abandoned dashboards dim to embers behind them; the lone warm desk lamp still burns at the frame's edge like a campfire under the stars; the '</>' mug nearly empty on the table edge. The technical figure from image #1 (the RESEARCH WIKI star-map: glowing star nodes joined by thin light lines, the night's main path idea→experiment→REJECT→audit→WARN_corrected→ACCEPT→paper, ONLY the four labels RESEARCH WIKI / REJECT / WARN_corrected / ACCEPT rendered large, small labels and unlabeled dim ember side-stars present, DDL T-02:41) IS the sky — reproduce its star LAYOUT faithfully

text.en: Even the rejected branch is here.

caption.zh: 黎明前，这一夜被写进 research wiki。
caption.en: Before dawn, the night is written into the research wiki.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the green reviewer sits at the keyboard typing the limitations line, calm authority; the blue executor leans on the desk edge pointing at the healed Tokyo in the terminal with a small relieved smile — bounce: tempered NOD, not a jump
condition.scene: a late-night dark writing room (density cal_S12): the glowing paper page is the brightest object in the room, pixel drafts and crossed-out printouts scattered on the desk, shelf spines 'CLAIM AUDIT' / 'STRUCTURED OUTPUTS', the claim-ledger board from the verdict glowing faintly behind, the empty '</>' mug pushed aside, one warm lamp over the keyboard. The technical figure from image #1 (PAPER — RESULTS: the headline 'schema-keyword-first +1.4 (scope-limited)', the struck ghost +6.2 in the margin, the limitations line, the side terminal with the REPAIRED {"city":"Tokyo"} ✓ parsed, the claim ledger, DDL T-01:57) IS the desk

text.en: Write it as it is — scope included.

caption.zh: +1.4，scope-limited——每一个数字都敢被检查。
caption.en: +1.4, scope-limited — every digit can survive inspection.

condition.identity_desc: the researcher (she): black rectangular glasses, dark short hair, black tee, backpack — exactly as in the reference
condition.characters: ONLY the researcher: walking home through the pool of warm light in front of the store, backpack on, steps tired but loose, NOT looking at her phone — she doesn't know what's happening right now
condition.scene: an empty street in the small hours (density cal_S12): warm yellow streetlamps relay one after another; the convenience-store sign pours warm light onto the sidewalk; inside the auto-door the shelves are lit but unmanned (ALL shelf labels and price tags blurred to unreadable — the sign is the ONLY readable text in the panel); a zebra crossing, a cat heading home, abstract pixel graffiti on a rolled-down shutter (shapes only, NO letters); the far cool blue night skyline and a few stars overhead — warm lamp ribbon vs cold night depth. The technical figure from image #1 (the neon OPEN / 24H sign) hangs above the store door

caption.zh: 她往家走，不知道论文正在此刻上传。
caption.en: She walks home, not knowing the paper is uploading right now.

condition.identity_desc: the CANONICAL DUO — blue executor: brown hair, NO beard; green reviewer: dark hair, beard
condition.characters: the blue executor watches the progress bar fill and gives a SMALL fist pump — bounce: small, tempered, ground down by the REJECT and the audit, not daring his old heights; the green reviewer stands behind at an angle and nods ONCE
condition.scene: the dark-cyber submission bay (density cal_S12): the central submit terminal glows over the #0A0E27 void with the green stamp's afterglow still hanging, a side screen scrolling the upload log, dark shelf spines 'CLAIM AUDIT' / 'RESEARCH WIKI', neon grid floor, the '</>' mug down to its dregs, one warm lamp. The technical figure from image #1 (SUBMIT terminal: paper.pdf ✓, the 100% progress bar, the centered green SUBMITTED stamp from the family, the RED DDL T-00:42 in its final-urgency state) dominates

caption.zh: T-00:42，论文带着写明的边界投了出去。
caption.en: At T-00:42, the paper goes in with its scope spelled out.

condition.identity_desc: the researcher (she): black rectangular glasses, dark short hair, black tee — exactly as in the reference
condition.characters: the researcher pushes the door open, one hand still holding her bag strap, the other reaching to WRAP AROUND the mug — and freezing there; the duo does NOT appear (the screen shows only the status band)
condition.scene: the SAME warm room, SAME desk, SAME camera angle as the very first bedroom panel (set continuity — density cal_S12): the backpack slipping by the door, the desk lamp still on, the sticky notes ('dllm-schema-keyword-first' etc.) and paper stacks untouched, and on the desk THE SAME 'ML RESEARCH' mug — now stone COLD: not a wisp of steam, a thin milk film on the surface; the laptop screen shows ONLY one green status band (the technical figure from image #1: 'SUBMITTED ✓' + green 'T-00:27'), the rest of the screen dark and low-detail; the night city outside deeper and colder — everything as it was, only the temperature has changed

caption.zh: 咖啡在她不在的 24 小时里彻底凉透了。
caption.en: The coffee went stone cold in the 24 hours she was away.

condition.identity_desc: LEFT of the ref = the researcher (black glasses, dark short hair, black tee); RIGHT of the ref = the duo (blue executor brown hair NO beard / green reviewer dark hair beard)
condition.characters: the researcher leans in and raises her palm to the OUTSIDE of the glass; INSIDE the screen the blue executor raises his palm to meet hers through the glass — bounce: his SMALLEST bounce of the whole film (the mirror landing of his hand-off MAX; the arc's final reading); the green reviewer stands aside inside the screen and nods
condition.scene: a close-up on the laptop in the same warm room (density cal_S12): inside the dark screen the duo stand in their cyber space, the executor's palm meeting hers through the glass with a soft ring of contact glow (background atmospheric glow allowed); the screen top bar reads 'SUBMITTED ✓' LARGE and crisp with the small ARIS tag in the corner (the technical figure from image #1 — the screen frame); outside the glass on the warm side: her fingertips, the corner of the COLD mug, the warm lamp halo — the warm human world and the dark digital world meeting on one pane of glass

caption.zh: 隔着一块玻璃，他只是微微一弹。
caption.en: Through the glass, he gives only the smallest bounce.
